name: Zonda - Extract Leads and Prospect Data for Segmentation Study

content.query:
select
lds.[id]
,lds.[cst_id]
,[LeadNumber]
,[Productid]
,[EntryDate]
,[dsp_id]
,[src_id]
,[brn_id]
,[sds_id]
,[srs_id]
,[DateEntered]
,[ApptDate]
,[app_id]
,[slr_id]
,[slr_id2]
,[slr_split]
,[SetBy]
,[VerifiedBy]
,[ConfirmedBy]
,[Sold]
,[GSA]
,[EverSet]
,[EverVerified]
,[EverConfirmed]
,[EverIssued]
,[EverNetIssued]
,[EverSat]
,[LastResult]
,cst.Address1
,cst.Address2
,cst.City
,cst.State
,cst.Zip
FROM 
[ODS].[LP_PHI_Lds_Leads] lds
,[ODS].[LP_PHI_cst_Customers] cst
where
lds.cst_id = cst.id
and lds.EntryDate >= '2021-01-01'
